title: tecoma fulva subsp. arequipensis
intro: Tecoma fulva subsp. arequipensis, also known as Yellow Trumpetbush, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Trumpet Vine family. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to lower blood sugar levels and exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Tecoma fulva subsp. arequipensis include its potential to help manage diabetes and other metabolic disorders, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to leverage its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
